title: Morning Mist over the Basin
caption: Thick fog rolling across the fern floor at dawn.
story: I arrived at the ridge before first light. As the sun breached the eastern peaks, rays pierced the heavy vapor, illuminating droplets suspended on ancient cedar needles.
curatorNote: Prints remarkably well on matte parchment paper. Outstanding atmospheric depth.
altText: Morning fog drifting low between tall evergreen trees in a lush rainforest.
